message:
feat(core): implement JOIN support (INNER, LEFT, CROSS) in connection.rs (bd-1mbz)

Add execute_join_select fallback path for multi-table SELECT queries
with JOINs. Uses nested-loop evaluation with ON condition filtering.
Supports INNER JOIN, LEFT JOIN (with NULL padding), CROSS JOIN,
USING constraints, WHERE filters, SELECT *, table.*, ORDER BY,
and LIMIT/OFFSET. Includes 6 integration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
